steps.title: Substitute x = -3 into the function
steps.content: We need to find $h(-3)$ where $h(x) = 5x - 9$. Substitute $x = -3$ directly:$$h(-3) = 5(-3) - 9$$

steps.title: Evaluate following order of operations
steps.content: Calculate multiplication first: $5(-3) = -15$. Then subtract: $-15 - 9 = -24$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
